## 🔄 Type of Change
<!-- Mark the appropriate option with an "x" -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration change
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (no functional changes)

## 🧪 Testing
<!-- Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes -->

- [ ] Tested locally with `docker-compose up`
- [ ] Verified YAML syntax with `docker-compose config`
- [ ] Tested Docker build with `docker build -f aptible/Dockerfile .`
- [ ] Ran security scans locally

## ✅ Checklist
<!-- Mark completed items with an "x" -->

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings

### Documentation
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] I have updated the README.md if needed
- [ ] I have added/updated comments in the code

### Security
- [ ] No secrets or credentials are exposed
- [ ] Dependencies are up to date and secure
- [ ] I have not introduced any new vulnerabilities
- [ ] Environment variables are properly documented

### Docker
- [ ] Dockerfile builds successfully
- [ ] docker-compose.yml is valid
- [ ] No hardcoded values that should be configurable
- [ ] Proper use of multi-stage builds (if applicable)
